zh.of Peover, Cheshire, England: 英國英格蘭爾奧福 素培利奧
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Davenport於1398年出生在英國爾奧維 奧福時，他的父親Ralph Davenport20歲，母親Joan de Leigh14歲。他於大約1422年與Joan Mainwaring在英國爾洛維爾 奧福結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1474年7月27日在英國爾達文波特享年76歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Davenport于1398年出生在英国爾奧維 奧福时，他的父亲Ralph Davenport20岁，母亲Joan de Leigh14岁。他于大约1422年与Joan Mainwaring在英国爾洛維爾 奧福结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1474年7月27日在英国爾達文波特享年76岁。

nameMeanings.name: Davenport
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire and Cheshire): habitational name from a place in Cheshire named Davenport, from the Dane river (apparently named with a Celtic cognate of Middle Welsh dafnu ‘to drop, to trickle’) + Old English port ‘market town’.

Irish: in Tipperary, this is an English surname adopted by bearers of Munster Gaelic Ó Donndubhartaigh ‘descendant of Donndubhartach’, a personal name composed of the elements donn ‘brown-haired man’ or ‘chieftain’ + dubh ‘black’ + artach ‘nobleman’.
History: John Davenport (died 1670) arrived in Boston, MA, in 1637. He came of an English Cheshire family associated with Capesthorne Hall, near Macclesfield.

variants.name: Devenport
meanings: English and Irish (Lancashire): variant of Davenport . The spelling Devonport is found in Ireland and it may have been this form which gave rise to Devenport.

variants.name: Dunworth
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Eamon, Niall.
Irish: adopted in Ireland by bearers of Gaelic Ó Donndubhartaigh (see Davenport 2).
English: perhaps a variant of Dungworth, see Dunsworth .

nameMeanings.name: John

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When John Davenport was born in 1398, in Over Peover, Cheshire, England, his father, Ralph Davenport, was 20 and his mother, Joan de Leigh, was 14. He married Joan Mainwaring about 1422, in Lower Peover, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 27 July 1474, in Davenport, Cheshire, England, at the age of 76.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Davenport est né en 1398, à Over Peover, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Ralph Davenport, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Joan de Leigh, avait 14 ans. Il a épousé Joan Mainwaring environ 1422, à Lower Peover, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 27 juillet 1474, à Davenport, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 76 ans.

Er hat um 1422 in Lower Peover, Cheshire, England Joan Mainwaring geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 27. Juli 1474 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Davenport, Cheshire, England.

Lui sposato Joan Mainwaring circa 1422, nel Lower Peover, Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 4 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: John Davenportが1398年にイギリスチェシュアイアオバー ペオバーで生まれた時，父Ralph Davenportは20歳，母Joan de Leighは14歳であった。約1422年にイギリスチェシュアイアロウエル ペオバーでJoan Mainwaringと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1474年7月27日にイギリスチェシュアイアダベンプオルトで76歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Davenport(이)가 1398년 영국 체실르 버 p오버에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph Davenport(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan de Leigh(은)는 14세였다. 그는 대략 1422년 영국 체실르 로어 p오버에서 Joan Mainwaring(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1474년 7월 27일 영국 체실르 대븐포트에서 76세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Joan Mainwaring aproximadamente 1422, em Lower Peover, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 27 de julho de 1474, em Davenport, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 76 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Davenport родился в 1398 г. в местности овир пеовир, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Ralph Davenport было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan de Leigh, 14. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Mainwaring около 1422 г. в местности лоуир пеовир, чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер 27 июля 1474 г. в местности давенпорт, чешир, Англия в возрасте 76 лет.
